title: Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems

{{Quote|<nowiki>'</nowiki>We were so focused on perfecting the advanced sensor analysis of the XPLR-R, that we simply ignored our needs in corporate defense,<nowiki>'</nowiki> said former VSIS president Rina Fio after her release by Arakyd forces. <nowiki>'</nowiki>Obviously that was a big mistake. We're pleased that under our new management that Viper will have the backing of the Techno Union military forces.<nowiki>'</nowiki>|"Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover"|<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />}}
'''Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems''' ('''VSIS''') was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]]. Shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was embroiled in a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] technology dispute with rival [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] that was resolved when the latter absorbed VSIS in a hostile takeover. Arakyd kept the company in operation as a research-and-development division, incorporating proprietary VSIS technology into its highly successful [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Arakyd says it will keep VSIS in operation as a research-and-development division.|"Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover"|<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />}}
Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer based in [[Viper Tower]], a facility located in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter's]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Hpaq]]. It was a smaller and younger firm than [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]. The company was led by President [[Rina Fio]] until [[Gender/Legends|she]] was ousted by Arakyd during its takeover of VSIS, who kept the company in operation as a research and development division. It employed at least one member of the [[Vulptereen/Legends|Vulptereen]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

VSIS' logo was an inverted [[Color/Legends|green]] triangle with rounded edges, containing a white trapezoid interlocked with a smaller blue triangle.<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

==History==
{{Quote|The 18-month-long dispute between Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems and Arakyd Industries is now resolved following the Arakyd assault and takeover of the VSIS headquarters.|"Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover"|<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />}}
[[File:AAD-4.jpg|thumb|left|175px|Arakyd's takeover of Viper Tower]]
During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]],<ref name="Separatist Crisis">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|news/1344_1.html|Senator Moe Killed in Blast}} and {{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|business/1344_1.html|Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover}} are both dated to 13:4:4. The former reports the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]] in a suspected [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] attack, dating 13:4:4 to the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].</ref> Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems was embroiled in an 18-[[Standard month/Legends|month]] dispute with<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" /> rival<ref name="AAD-4">{{DB|droid|aad4|AAD-4}}</ref> Arakyd Industries. The latter asserted that Viper's [[XPLR-R]], a prototype [[Explorer droid/Legends|hyperspace-route-mapping and habitation-location unit]], borrowed heavily from the proprietary designs of Arakyd's line of [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] and demanded aggressive remuneration and technology rights of the younger firm. However, VSIS was so focused on perfecting the XPLR-R's advanced [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] analysis that it ignored its needs in corporate defense.<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

Shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|business/1344_1.html|Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover}} reports the end of the dispute between Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems and [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] on [[Great ReSynchronization|13:4:4]], while {{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}} dates the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|beginning]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to 13:5:21. This places the dispute's resolution nearly seven [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before the Clone Wars begins.</ref> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the dispute was resolved when Arakyd absorbed its smaller competitor in an armed takeover.<ref name="TNEGTD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> 60 [[AAD-4 assault droid]]s belonging to competitor Arakyd Industries entered Viper Tower just prior to the end of the business [[Standard day/Legends|day]] and quickly eliminated its ground-floor security units. The remaining Viper staff were relocated to the testing wing while three [[XR-37]] [[Droid tank/Legends|droid tanks]] obliterated the building's top floors, which housed accounting and administrative divisions. Arakyd kept VSIS in operation as a research-and-development division,
while a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] remained at Viper Tower to assist with the transition.<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

In a comment made to the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] following her release from Arakyd forces, ousted VSIS president Rina Fio said the company was pleased that under new management Viper would have the backing of the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union's]] [[Techno Union Droid Army/Legends|military forces]]. Arakyd's takeover of VSIS was reported in "Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover," a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] Business article,<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" /> and, in possession of proprietary Viper technology, the company released the [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]], its biggest success to date.<ref name="TNEGTD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems was originally created for ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]]'', a [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] article written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] with illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]] and released on [[April 4]], [[2002]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />
